data.prompt: Top 1/3 of frame is empty near-black backdrop with subtle dark vignette. Bottom 2/3 contains three identical small isometric instrument modules with control faces aligned in a single row on a dark matte bench surface, faint hairline grid texture, soft warm and cool LED dot accents on module faces.
